statement: In every magma, Equation 150 (`x = y * ((z * w) * u)`) implies Equation 3945 (`x * y = (x * (z * z)) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0419
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op z w) u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op (op x (op z z)) w)
